content:
# Final Review Votes
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.5-xhigh

## Summary

Accepted the symlink fingerprinting amendment because it identifies a real stability-detection bug in dirty symlink scenarios.

## Votes

- `fr-2-57793a7e`: Accept
  The current fingerprint only hashes regular file contents and follows symlinks with sha256sum, so dirty symlinks can change target text without changing the computed fingerprint when status and index remain the same. Since Git represents symlinks by their link text, the fingerprint should explicitly detect symlinks and hash readlink output with a distinct type prefix to avoid premature stabilization.
